message:
Fix Nix build documentation

- Add macOS as supported platform
- Add cachix binary cache instructions
- Correct static build workflow (no separate shell)
- Reference nix/static-binary.sh helper script
- Remove tangential direnv and NixOS sections

files.patch:
@@ -110,32 +110,34 @@ docker build -t tenzir/tenzir-dev --target development .
 
 ## Nix
 
-We use [Nix](https://nixos.org) for reproducible builds on Linux. The flake
-provides all [dependencies](#dependencies):
+We use [Nix](https://nixos.org) for reproducible builds on Linux and macOS. The
+flake provides all [dependencies](#dependencies):
 
 ```sh
 nix develop
 cmake --preset nix-clang-release
 cmake --build --preset nix-clang-release
 ```
 
-You can also delegate the entire build to Nix with `nix build`, but this doesn't
-support incremental builds.
+For faster builds, configure the Tenzir binary cache:
 
-For automatic shell setup via [direnv](https://direnv.net), create `.envrc`:
-
-```
-use flake
+```sh
+nix run nixpkgs#cachix -- use tenzir
 ```
 
-To build static binaries, use the static environment and presets:
+You can also delegate the entire build to Nix with `nix build .#tenzir-de`, but
+this doesn't support incremental builds.
+
+To build static binaries on Linux:
 
 ```sh
-nix develop .#tenzir-static
+nix develop
 cmake --preset nix-clang-static-release
 cmake --build --preset nix-clang-static-release
 ```
 
+Alternatively, use the helper script `nix/static-binary.sh`.
+
 ## Dependencies
 
 | Required |                           Dependency                           |    Version     | Description                                                                                                                                                      |
